query: world cup 2026 usa vs mexico score

results.title: USA vs Mexico - FIFA World Cup 2026 Group Stage
results.content: The United States defeated Mexico 2-1 in their Group B opener at MetLife Stadium. Goals from Christian Pulisic (23') and Weston McKennie (67') sealed the win, with Hirving Lozano (45') pulling one back for El Tri.

results.title: World Cup 2026: USMNT beats Mexico in historic rivalry match
results.content: In front of 82,000 fans in New Jersey, the US Men's National Team secured a crucial three points against their CONCACAF rivals. Pulisic opened the scoring with a curling free kick before McKennie headed home from a corner.

results.title: Match Report: United States 2-1 Mexico | World Cup 2026
results.content: The hosts got their World Cup campaign off to a winning start with a hard-fought victory over Mexico. Lozano's equalizer threatened to derail the party but McKennie's second-half header restored the lead.

results.title: World Cup 2026 Group B standings after matchday 1
results.content: Group B standings: USA 3pts, Canada 3pts, Mexico 0pts, Ecuador 0pts. The United States and Canada both won their opening matches to take early control of the group.

results.title: Pulisic shines as USA open World Cup with victory
results.content: Christian Pulisic delivered a man-of-the-match performance as the United States opened their home World Cup with a 2-1 win over Mexico. The AC Milan winger's free kick in the 23rd minute set the tone for a dominant first-half display.
